headline: Has The Recent Pullback In Netflix (NFLX) Opened A Valuation Opportunity For Investors?
summary: If you are wondering whether Netflix's current share price reflects its true value, you are not alone. This article focuses squarely on that question. After a recent close at US$93.24, the stock has seen a 13.4% decline over the last week and a near flat 0.1% decline over 30 days, while still showing a 2.5% gain year to date and a 190.3% return over three years. Recent headlines around Netflix have focused on its position in the streaming market, including ongoing competition for subscribers...

content.title: Has The Recent Pullback In Netflix (NFLX) Opened A Valuation Opportunity For Investors?

headline: Netflix announces $25 billion share buyback
summary: Netflix said on Thursday its board has authorized an additional $25 billion share ‌repurchase program, resuming capital returns after the ‌streaming giant walked away from a $72 billion deal to buy Warner ​Bros Discovery's assets.  Its shares rose 1.5% in premarket trading.  The new authorization is on top of a buyback approved in December 2024 and has no expiration date. ‌Netflix had about $6.8 billion ⁠remaining under its previous buyback plan as of March end.

content.title: Netflix announces $25 billion share buyback
content.summary: Netflix said on Thursday its board has authorized an additional $25 billion share ‌repurchase program, resuming capital returns after the ‌streaming giant walked away from a $72 billion deal to buy Warner ​Bros Discovery's assets.  Its shares rose 1.5% in premarket trading.  The new authorization is on top of a buyback approved in December 2024 and has no expiration date. ‌Netflix had about $6.8 billion ⁠remaining under its previous buyback plan as of March end.

headline: S&P 500 Retreats but Holds 7100 on Fresh Mideast Escalation as Earnings Kick Off
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is pointing lower ahead of the open on Thursday, with traders taking profits after Wednesday’s record-setting session where the benchmark rose 1% and the Nasdaq added nearly 2%. Early weakness in futures looks more like profit-taking than a change in tone, with earnings beats, cooler oil, and fresh buybacks setting the ... headline: 5 Insightful Analyst Questions From Netflix’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Netflix’s first quarter results were met with a significant negative market reaction, as the company’s profit fell short of Wall Street expectations despite revenue exceeding consensus. Management attributed the quarter’s performance to continued growth in paid memberships, strong engagement in Asia-Pacific markets, and the impact of high-profile live events like the World Baseball Classic in Japan. headline: Netflix boosts share buyback plan by $25 billion after failed Warner Bros bid
summary: Netflix said on Thursday its board has authorized an additional $25 billion share repurchase program, resuming ‌capital returns after the streaming giant walked away from a $72 ‌billion deal to buy Warner Bros Discovery's assets.  The new ​authorization is on top of a buyback approved in December 2024 and has no expiration date.  Netflix had about $6.8 billion remaining under its previous buyback plan as of March-end.

content.title: Netflix boosts share buyback plan by $25 billion after failed Warner Bros bid
content.summary: Netflix said on Thursday its board has authorized an additional $25 billion share repurchase program, resuming ‌capital returns after the streaming giant walked away from a $72 ‌billion deal to buy Warner Bros Discovery's assets.  The new ​authorization is on top of a buyback approved in December 2024 and has no expiration date.  Netflix had about $6.8 billion remaining under its previous buyback plan as of March-end.

headline: Netflix (NFLX) Is Down 13.4% After Soft Q2 Guide And Reed Hastings’ Exit - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: Netflix reported past first-quarter 2026 results with revenue of US$12,249.76 million and net income of US$5,282.79 million, while guiding second-quarter sales and earnings below analyst expectations and confirming that co-founder and chair Reed Hastings will step down from the board in June. Alongside reaffirmed full-year 2026 guidance and ambitious targets for higher operating margins, Netflix expanded its share repurchase capacity and explored acquiring the Radford Studio Center,...
